name: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion on api-gateway-prod
description: Simulation of connection pool exhaustion following a recent v2.3 deployment on api-gateway-prod.
expected_diagnosis: Recent deployment of v2.3 introduced unclosed database transactions causing connection pool exhaustion on api-gateway-prod.

alert_payload.details: sqlalchemy.exc.TimeoutError: QueuePool limit of size 5 overflow 10 reached, connection timed out.
